title: Distribute Candy
hints: First pass (left to right): ensure each child has more candies than the left neighbor if their rating is higher.
Second pass (right to left): ensure each child has more candies than the right neighbor if their rating is higher.
Initialize all children with 1 candy (minimum requirement).
In the second pass, use max() to ensure we don't reduce candies that were already set correctly in the first pass.
The sum of all candies gives the minimum total required.
